title: Bug Zapper, 4200V Electric Mosquito Killer, Mosquito Killer Lamp, Rechargeable UV Fly Zapper with 4000mAh Battery, for Flying Insect Control Lamp, Outdoor & Indoor
bullet_points: High-Efficient Mosquito Control: This rechargeable electric mosquito killer lamp features built-in high-intensity ultraviolet light, which emits ultraviolet wavelengths of 365-395nm in all directions, capable of scientifically and precisely trapping and killing mosquitoes, moths, and other flying insects, covering a 360 ° range, and then immediately kills them with a 4200V high dome.

Safety & Non-Toxic: The 360° UV mosquito killer lamp uses physical methods to kill mosquitoes. It is noiseless, chemical-free, and radiation-free, and can effectively cover an area of ​​up to 90 square meters. An external safety net prevents electric shock, making it safe and environmentally friendly.

4000mAh Large Capacity Battery: This Electric Mosquito Killer Light is equipped with a built-in 4000mAh rechargeable battery and USB charging cable, which can be recharged. Built-in large battery, can work as a mosquito killer for 10h, and more than 12h as a night light. (When the mosquito killer is opened, do not touch the inside of the equipment.)

Passed IPX4 Waterproof Level Test: This mosquito killer lamp is perfectly safe to use even in the rain, as it is completely splash-proof. You can hang it in any area where flying insects are frequently seen using the convenient hanging ring, or place it on a flat surface using the sturdy base to repel mosquitoes anytime, anywhere. Suitable for bedrooms, living rooms, bathrooms, kitchens, hotels, terraces, balconies, garages, decks, and other locations.

Portable & Easy to Clean: Lightweight and compact, this outdoor bug zapper with a handy hanging ring for effortless portability—no assembly required! The detachable tray and included cleaning brush make maintenance a breeze. Simply remove dead insects and debris to keep your zapper running at peak performance. Less hassle, more zapping!
